title: Hitachi India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Hitachi India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hitachi India South Asia Partners in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
